kinyarwanda.ice_shell_over_a_subsurface_ocean_top_: Igishishwa cy'urubura hejuru y'inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso. Ahantu heza kurusha ahandi ho gushakira ubuzima bw'ahandi!

kinyarwanda.only_moon_with_a_thick_atmosphere_has_: Ukwezi kwonyine gufite ikirere gikomeye. Gufite ibiyaga n'imigezi bya metani y'amazi!
kinyarwanda.geysers_of_water_vapor_erupting_from_t: Amasoko y'umwuka w'amazi asohoka ku mpera y'epfo. Inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso yaremejwe!
kinyarwanda.giant_herschel_crater_makes_it_look_li: Umwobo munini Herschel utuma kugaragara nka Death Star ya Star Wars!
kinyarwanda.two_toned_one_half_bright_white_the_ot: Amabara abiri: igice kimwe cyera cyane, ikindi cyirabura nk'amakara. Gufite umusozi munini ku murongo wo hagati.
kinyarwanda.most_geologically_diverse_moon_has_a_2: Ukwezi gufite ubutandukane bwa geologiya bwinshi kurusha andi. Gufite urutare ruhagaze rw'uburebure bwa km 20 rwitwa Verona Rupes!
kinyarwanda.largest_moon_of_uranus_named_after_the: Ukwezi kunini kurusha andi kwa Uranus. Kwahawe izina ry'umwamikazi w'ibisamanyanga muri Shakespeare.
kinyarwanda.brightest_and_possibly_youngest_surfac: Ubuso bumurika kandi bushobora kuba buto mu myaka mu mezi manini ya Uranus.
kinyarwanda.orbits_backwards_probably_a_captured_k: Kuzenguruka kwako ni ukw'inyuma! Bishoboka ko ari ikintu cyafashwe kivuye mu Mukandara wa Kuiper. Gufite amasoko ya azote.
kinyarwanda.half_the_size_of_pluto_they_orbit_each: Kingana na kimwe cya kabiri cya Pluto! Bizengurukana (imibumbe mito y'impanga). Gufite ingofero itukura ku mpera.
kinyarwanda.no_atmosphere_stars_visible_even_durin: Nta kirere — inyenyeri zigaragara ndetse no ku manywa. Izuba rigaragara rinini kandi rimurika cyane.

kinyarwanda.blue_sky_from_rayleigh_scattering_5_00: Ikirere cy'ubururu kubera gutatana kwa Rayleigh. Inyenyeri ~5,000 zigaragara n'amaso masa.
kinyarwanda.butterscotch_sky_from_iron_dust_blue_s: Ikirere cy'ibara ry'umuhondo-ikigina kubera umukungugu w'icyuma. Izuba rirenga ryera ubururu! Phobos izamuka inshuro 2 ku munsi.
kinyarwanda.no_surface_from_cloud_tops_see_auroras: Nta buso — uhereye ku mpinga z'ibicu, ubona aurora imurika inshuro 100 kurusha iy'Isi.
kinyarwanda.rings_visible_as_bright_arcs_overhead_: Impeta zigaragara nk'imirongo imurika hejuru. Uhereye kuri Titan: ikirere cy'igihu cy'oranje, Saturn igaragara inini inshuro 11 kurusha Ukwezi kwacu kuzuye.
kinyarwanda.sun_just_a_very_bright_point_42_year_s: Izuba ni akadomo kamurika cyane gusa. Ibihe by'imyaka 42. Kunama gukabije bivuze ko Izuba rishobora kuba hejuru cyane ku mpera.
kinyarwanda.sun_900x_dimmer_than_on_earth_still_30: Izuba rimurika inshuro 900 munsi y'uko rimurika ku Isi. Nyamara riracyamurika inshuro 300 kurusha Ukwezi kuzuye ku Isi.
kinyarwanda.charon_appears_7x_larger_than_our_moon: Charon igaragara inini inshuro 7 kurusha Ukwezi kwacu. Bafatanye ku buryo bw'imiraba — Charon ihagaze idahindagurika mu kirere.

kinyarwanda.one_of_7_rocky_planets_best_candidate_: Umwe mu mibumbe 7 y'urutare. Ahantu heza kurusha ahandi ho kubona amazi adakonje.
kinyarwanda.earth_s_bigger_cousin_sun_like_star_38: « Mubyara munini » w'Isi. Inyenyeri isa n'Izuba. Umwaka w'iminsi 385.
kinyarwanda.rains_molten_glass_sideways_blue_color: Igwisha ikirahure cyashongeshejwe kiruhande! Ibara ry'ubururu riva ku duce twa silikate.
kinyarwanda.super_earth_covered_in_lava_oceans_may: Isi-Nkuru ipfukiranywe n'inyanja za lave. Ishobora kuba ifite intima ya diyama.
kinyarwanda.so_hot_that_iron_vaporizes_on_the_day_: Ishyushye cyane ku buryo icyuma gihinduka umwuka ku ruhande rw'amanywa kikagwa nk'imvura ya metali y'amazi nijoro!
kinyarwanda.first_exoplanet_ever_discovered_1992_o: Exoplanet ya mbere yavumbuwe (1992)! Izenguruka inyenyeri yapfuye ya pulsar.
kinyarwanda.earth_sized_planet_in_habitable_zone_d: Umubumbe ungana n'Isi uri mu gace gatuwe. Wavumbuwe na TESS mu 2020.
kinyarwanda.tiny_magnetic_field_from_partially_mol: Umurima muto wa magneti uva ku ntima yashonze igice. Ntuhagije kurinda ubuso.
kinyarwanda.no_global_magnetic_field_solar_wind_in: Nta murima wa magneti w'umubumbe wose. Umuyaga w'izuba uhurira n'ikirere ako kanya.
kinyarwanda.strong_dipole_field_from_liquid_iron_o: Umurima ukomeye wa dipole uva ku ntima yo hanze y'icyuma cy'amazi. Ukora imikandara ya Van Allen. Ni ingenzi ku buzima!
kinyarwanda.lost_its_global_field_4_billion_years_: Wabuze umurima wawo w'umubumbe wose mu myaka ~miliyari 4 ishize. Magnetisimu isigaye mu gishishwa cya kera.
kinyarwanda.strongest_in_solar_system_deadly_radia: Ukomeye kurusha iyindi muri sisitemu y'izuba! Imikandara y'imirasire yica. Hidorojene ya metali ikora uwo murima.
kinyarwanda.unique_almost_perfectly_aligned_with_r: Udasanzwe: uhuye hafi neza n'umurongo wo kuzenguruka. Intima ya hidorojene ya metali.
kinyarwanda.tilted_59_from_rotation_axis_off_cente: Wanamye 59° uvuye ku murongo wo kuzenguruka! Nturi hagati. Imiterere idasanzwe cyane.
kinyarwanda.also_highly_tilted_47_and_off_center_c: Nawo wanamye cyane (47°) kandi nturi hagati. Ibidukikije bya magneti bigoye.
kinyarwanda.too_small_and_cold_for_a_dynamo_no_pro: Muto kandi ukonje cyane ku buryo hataba dinamo. Nta kirinda umuyaga w'izuba.
kinyarwanda.venus_has_a_runaway_greenhouse_effect_: Venus ifite ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zidashobora guhagarara zigera kuri 462°C!
kinyarwanda.saturn_has_146_known_moons_as_of_2024: Saturn ifite amezi 293 azwi ku rutonde rwa JPL rw'amasatelite y'imibumbe rw'ubu.
kinyarwanda.uranus_has_an_axial_tilt_of_97_77: Uranus yanamye ku murongo wayo ku rugero rwa 97.77°!
kinyarwanda.mercury_is_only_4_879_km_in_diameter: Mercury ifite umurambararo wa km 4,879 gusa.
kinyarwanda.pluto_takes_248_earth_years_to_orbit_t: Pluto ifata imyaka 248 y'Isi kugira ngo izenguruke Izuba!
kinyarwanda.iron_oxide_rust_gives_mars_its_red_col: Okiside y'icyuma (ingese) ni yo iha Mars ibara ryayo ritukura.
kinyarwanda.saturn_s_density_is_less_than_water_0_: Ubwinshi bwa Saturn buri munsi y'ubw'amazi (0.687 g/cm³)!
kinyarwanda.olympus_mons_on_mars_is_21_9_km_high_n: Olympus Mons kuri Mars ifite uburebure bwa km 21.9 — hafi inshuro 3 za Everest!
kinyarwanda.neptune_s_winds_reach_2_100_km_h: Imiyaga ya Neptune igera kuri 2,100 km/h!
kinyarwanda.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_charge: Umurima wa magneti w'Isi wirukana uduce dufite amashanyarazi duva ku zuba. Ozone ifasha kuri UV, ariko magnetosifeeri ni yo ngabo y'ibanze!
kinyarwanda.the_iau_s_2006_definition_requires_pla: Ibisobanuro bya IAU byo mu 2006 bisaba ko imibumbe isukura inzira yayo y'orbite ikayivanamo ibindi bisigazwa.
kinyarwanda.also_called_the_goldilocks_zone_not_to: Nanone hitwa « agace ka Goldilocks » — ntigashyuha cyane, ntigakonja cyane, ku buryo amazi adakonje yabaho ku buso.
kinyarwanda.the_moon_rotates_exactly_once_per_orbi: Ukwezi kuzenguruka rimwe gusa kuri buri rugendo — uku guhuza guterwa n'imbaraga z'imiraba mu myaka miliyari.
kinyarwanda.opportunity_rover_found_hematite_blueb: Rover Opportunity yabonye « uduterekurutsi » twa hematite — amabuye ashobora gukorwa gusa mu mazi. Amafoto yo mu kirere yerekana inkengero za kera z'imigezi!
kinyarwanda.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus irushyushye (462°C kuri 430°C)! Mercury nta kirere ifite cyo gufata ubushyuhe. Ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera ni zo zibanza kuruta intera.
kinyarwanda.gas_giants_have_no_solid_surface_they_: Ibihangange bya gaze nta buso bukomeye bifite! Ni gaze ya hidorojene na heliyumu ahanini igenda ikomera uko wegera intima. Sonde yamanuka itagira aho igarukira.
kinyarwanda.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Intera y'Isi n'Izuba ntihinduka ku munsi. Saa sita bivuze gusa ko Izuba riri hejuru cyane mu kirere cyawe. Isi iba hafi cyane muri Mutarama (perihelion)!
kinyarwanda.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter iragutse inshuro 11 kurusha Isi, kandi Isi 1,300 zashoboraga kwinjira muri yo! Sisitemu y'izuba ifite itandukaniro rikabije ry'ubunini.
kinyarwanda.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto iracyari muri sisitemu y'izuba! Yavanywe ku « mubumbe » ishyirwa ku « mubumbe muto » mu 2006, ariko iracyazenguruka Izuba.
kinyarwanda.the_asteroid_belt_is_mostly_empty_spac: Umukandara wa asteroyide ahanini ni ubusa! Intera iri hagati ya asteroyide ni miliyoni za km. Ibyogajuru binyuramo nta kaga.
kinyarwanda.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Si buri gihe! Saturn ifite misa inshuro 95 y'Isi ariko rukuruzi ku buso ni 1.06g gusa kuko ari nini kandi ifite ubwinshi buke. Ibiro biterwa na misa NA rayo.
kinyarwanda.all_parts_of_the_moon_receive_sunlight: Ibice byose by'Ukwezi bibona urumuri rw'izuba! « Uruhande rwa kure » ni igice tudashobora kubona tuvuye ku Isi kubera gufatwa n'imiraba. Kibona Izuba nk'ibindi.
kinyarwanda.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Agace gatuwe (cyangwa « agace ka Goldilocks ») ni urwego rw'intera uvuye ku nyenyeri aho amazi adakonje yashobora kubaho ku buso bw'umubumbe. Muri sisitemu yacu y'izuba, Venus iri ku mpera yo imbere, Isi iri hagati, na Mars iri ku mpera yo hanze. Ariko kugira amazi adakonje binasaba ikirere n'umurima wa magneti bikwiye!
kinyarwanda.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Iyo urumuri rw'izuba rushyushya ubuso bw'umubumbe, ubuso busohora ubushyuhe (infarageru). Gaze z'inzu y'ibimera (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) zifata ubwo bushyuhe zikongera kubusohora, bigashyushya umubumbe. Inzu y'ibimera y'Isi ni +33°C (itunga ubuzima). Iya Venus ni +510°C (idashobora guhagarara). Mars ntayigira na gato (-60°C ku mpuzandengo). Ingano ya gaze y'inzu y'ibimera ni yo igena icyavamo!
kinyarwanda.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Umurima wa magneti w'umubumbe ukora « magnetosifeeri » — ingabo itagaragara yirukana umuyaga w'izuba (uduce dufite amashanyarazi duva ku Zuba). Magnetosifeeri y'Isi irinda ikirere cyacu kandi ituma ubuzima bushoboka. Mars yabuze umurima wayo wa magneti mu myaka miliyari 4 ishize, maze ikirere cyayo kigenda kivanwaho buhoro. Magnetosifeeri ya Jupiter ikomeye inshuro 20,000 kurusha iy'Isi!
kinyarwanda.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: Mu 2006, Ihuriro Mpuzamahanga ry'Ubumenyi bw'Ikirere ryashyizeho ibipimo bitatu by'umubumbe: (1) Uzenguruka Izuba ✓, (2) Ufite misa ihagije yo kugira imiterere y'uruziga ✓, (3) « Wasukuye orbite yawo » uvanamo ibindi bisigazwa ✗. Pluto isangira agace kayo k'orbite n'ibihumbi by'ibintu byo mu Mukandara wa Kuiper, bityo ishyirwa mu « mibumbe mito ». Ibyo ntibituma iba idashimishije — New Horizons yerekanye ko ikora mu buryo bwa geologiya!
kinyarwanda.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: Mu myaka miliyari, imbaraga za rukuruzi z'imiraba zishobora kugabanya umuvuduko wo kuzenguruka kw'ukwezi kugeza kuhuye n'igihe cyako cyo kuzenguruka. Icyavuyemo: uruhande rumwe ruhora rwerekeye ku mubumbe. Ukwezi kwacu gufashwe n'imiraba y'Isi. Mercury ifashwe igice n'Izuba (igipimo 3:2). Pluto na Charon bafatanye — bahora bereka uruhande rumwe!
kinyarwanda.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Ikimenyetso cy'ubuzima ni ikintu cyose kigaragaza ubuzima bwa kera cyangwa ubw'ubu. Abahanga bashakisha: (1) amazi adakonje, (2) molekile ngugu, (3) gaze zo mu kirere nka ogisijene cyangwa metani zitari kubaho ubuzima butazikoze, (4) inkomoko z'ingufu. Ahantu heza kurusha ahandi muri sisitemu yacu y'izuba: Mars (amazi ya kera), Europa (inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso), Enceladus (amasoko y'amazi), na Titan (ibiyaga bya metani).
kinyarwanda.smallest_planet_no_atmosphere_to_retai: Umubumbe muto kurusha iyindi; nta kirere cyo gufata ubushyuhe.
kinyarwanda.hottest_planet_due_to_runaway_greenhou: Umubumbe ushyushye kurusha iyindi kubera ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zidashobora guhagarara. Uzenguruka wisubiranya!
kinyarwanda.only_known_planet_with_liquid_water_an: Umubumbe wonyine uzwiho amazi adakonje n'ubuzima.
kinyarwanda.has_the_tallest_volcano_in_the_solar_s: Ufite ikirunga kirekire kurusha ibindi muri sisitemu y'izuba: Olympus Mons (uburebure bwa km 21.9).
kinyarwanda.largest_planet_the_great_red_spot_is_a: Umubumbe munini kurusha iyindi. Agace Kanini Gatukura ni inkubi y'umuyaga irenze Isi!
kinyarwanda.its_rings_are_made_of_ice_and_rock_cou: Impeta zawo zikozwe mu rubura n'urutare. Zashoboraga kureremba mu kabindi kanini k'amazi!
kinyarwanda.rotates_on_its_side_an_ice_giant_with_: Uzenguruka uryamye ku ruhande! Igihangange cy'urubura gifite ikirere cya metani.
kinyarwanda.windiest_planet_winds_up_to_2_100_km_h: Umubumbe ufite imiyaga myinshi: imiyaga igera kuri 2,100 km/h. Ubururu bwimbitse bwa metani.
kinyarwanda.dwarf_planet_since_2006_has_a_heart_sh: Umubumbe muto kuva mu 2006. Ufite urubura runini rufite imiterere y'umutima rwitwa Tombaugh Regio.
kinyarwanda.smallest_planet_closest_to_the_sun_no_: Umubumbe muto kurusha iyindi, uri hafi y'Izuba kurusha iyindi, nta kirere nyakuri ufite.
kinyarwanda.thick_co_atmosphere_runaway_greenhouse: Ikirere gikomeye cya CO₂, ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zidashobora guhagarara, uzenguruka wisubiranya.

Disiki y'ikusanyabintu ni ibintu bizunguruka byinjira, bigashyuha kugera kuri miliyoni z'amadigere biturutse ku kwikubita. Imyobo izenguruka vuba ishobora kurasa imirasire ya relativiste ku murongo wo kuzenguruka.
kinyarwanda.scrub_earth_years_and_watch_all_five_i: Nyuza imyaka y'Isi urebe imibumbe yose itanu yo imbere izenguruka ku muvuduko wayo nyawo. Itegeko rya gatatu rya Kepler mu bikorwa.
kinyarwanda.kepler_s_third_law_orbital_period_squa: Itegeko rya gatatu rya Kepler: igihe cyo kuzenguruka ku isikwari ∝ intera ku kibe. Imibumbe yo imbere iriruka; iyo hanze igenda buhoro. Jupiter ifata imyaka 12 y'Isi ku ruzenguruko rumwe; Mercury izenguruka buri minsi 88.
kinyarwanda.build_a_spacecraft_from_real_component: Ubaka icyogajuru ukoresheje ibice nyabyo. Hitamo intima, ingufu, imbaraga zo kugenda + umutwaro — reba misa + ikiguzi bihinduka.
kinyarwanda.the_sun_has_an_11_year_cycle_of_sunspo: Izuba rifite uruziga rw'imyaka 11 rw'ibikorwa by'utudomo tw'izuba. Nyuza urebe utudomo tw'izuba tuza tukagenda + ibiturika bya CME.
kinyarwanda.the_sun_cycles_every_11_years_between_: Izuba rizenguruka buri myaka ~11 hagati y'igipimo gito (utudomo duke, gutuza) n'igipimo kinini (utudomo twinshi, ibirimi by'izuba na CME kenshi). Uruziga rwa 25 rwageze ku ntera ndende mu 2024-2025 kandi ubu ruragabanuka.
kinyarwanda.where_could_life_as_we_know_it_survive: Ni hehe ubuzima nk'ubwo tuzi bwabasha kubaho hafi y'inyenyeri iyo ari yo yose? Hindura urumuri rw'inyenyeri + intera y'umubumbe urebe.
kinyarwanda.the_habitable_zone_is_where_surface_wa: Agace gatuwe ni aho amazi yo ku buso ashobora kuguma adakonje. Impera yo imbere: ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zumisha amazi. Impera yo hanze: urubura rufata CO2, ubukonje bugakabya. Impera zihinduka nka √L.
kinyarwanda.drag_the_moon_closer_to_make_earth_s_t: Kurura Ukwezi kwegere kugira ngo imiraba y'Isi ikure. Menya ko kubyimba kuba ku mpande zombi, iyo hafi n'iyo kure.
kinyarwanda.tides_happen_because_gravity_pulls_mor: Imiraba ibaho kuko rukuruzi ikurura cyane ku ruhande rwa hafi kurusha uruhande rwa kure rw'Isi. Impande zombi zirabyimba. Izuba n'Ukwezi bifatanyije bikora imiraba minini (iyo bihujwe ku murongo) n'imito (iyo bihagaze ku nguni).
kinyarwanda.rotate_earth_and_adjust_season_watch_t: Zungurutsa Isi kandi uhindure igihe cy'umwaka. Reba umurongo utandukanya amanywa n'ijoro ugenda + kunama kw'umurongo gukahindura igice cy'isi kimurikiwe.
kinyarwanda.five_gravitational_sweet_spots_between: Ibibanza bitanu bya rukuruzi hagati y'imibiri ibiri aho ibyogajuru bishobora guhagarara. James Webb iri kuri L2.
kinyarwanda.green_stable_equilibria_l4_l5_yellow_u: Icyatsi: uburinganire buhamye (L4, L5) • Umuhondo: budahamye ariko bufite akamaro (L1, L2, L3)
kinyarwanda.five_points_in_any_two_body_orbit_wher: Ibibanza bitanu muri buri orbite y'imibiri ibiri aho rukuruzi n'imbaraga zisunika hanze bipimana. Ibyogajuru bishobora guhagarara hano bikoresheje lisansi nkeya. JWST iri kuri L2 — buri gihe inyuma y'Isi, kure y'Izuba.
kinyarwanda.each_element_fingerprints_light_in_spe: Buri lementi ishushanya urumuri ku burebure bw'imiraba bwihariye. Nyuza kuri lementi urebe uko abahanga b'ikirere bazimenya mu nyenyeri za kure.
kinyarwanda.every_element_emits_its_own_unique_pat: Buri lementi isohora imiterere yayo bwite y'uburebure bw'imiraba y'urumuri — ikimenyetso cyayo cya sipekitoro. Turebye urumuri ruva ku nyenyeri za kure, dushobora kumenya ibizigize. Ni ko tuzi ko Izuba ari 75% hidorojene!
kinyarwanda.click_constellations_to_see_their_star: Kanda ku matsinda y'inyenyeri urebe inyenyeri zayo + imirongo ihuza. Buri nyenyeri ifite ibara ryayo bwite + izina nyakuri.
kinyarwanda.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Amatsinda y'inyenyeri ni imiterere y'inyenyeri imico itandukanye yamenye mu binyejana byinshi. IAU yashyizeho amatsinda 88 yemewe mu 1922. Inyenyeri ziri mu itsinda rimwe akenshi ntizegeranye koko — zigaragara zegeranye zirebwe ku Isi gusa.
kinyarwanda.how_much_delta_v_travel_time_to_reach_: Delta-v ingana ite + igihe cy'urugendo kingana iki kugira ngo ugere ahantu hatandukanye? Ama orbite y'ukwimuka kwa Hohmann yerekanwe.
kinyarwanda.a_hohmann_transfer_is_the_most_fuel_ef_2: Ukwimuka kwa Hohmann ni uburyo bukoresha lisansi nkeya kurusha ubundi bwo kwimuka hagati y'ama orbite abiri y'uruziga. Bukoresha gutwika kabiri: rimwe ryo kwinjira mu elipsi y'ukwimuka, irindi ryo kuyihindura uruziga aho ugana. Δv ni impinduka yose y'umuvuduko ikenewe.
kinyarwanda.mars_rover_pathfinder: 🚗 Umushakisha w'Inzira wa Rover ya Mars
kinyarwanda.pilot_a_rover_from_start_to_goal_plan_: Yobora rover uhereye ku ntangiriro kugera ku ntego. Teganya inzira ikikije amabuye n'imisozi; witondere lisansi yawe!
kinyarwanda.drive_the_rover_from_start_to_goal_cos: Yobora rover uhereye ku ntangiriro kugera ku ntego. Ikiguzi: ubutaka buringaniye 1,
kinyarwanda.plan_the_path_to_conserve_fuel_like_re: Teganya inzira kugira ngo uzigame lisansi. Nka rover nyazo za Mars, buri metero isaba kugena lisansi.
kinyarwanda.how_astronomers_measure_distance_each_: Uko abahanga b'ikirere bapima intera: buri buryo bushingira ku bukurikira. Zamuka uhereye ku bunini bw'Isi ugere ku isanzure rigaragara.
kinyarwanda.compared_sun_angle_in_two_cities_first: Yagereranyije inguni y'izuba mu migi ibiri. Ipima rya mbere ry'Isi.
kinyarwanda.hipparchus_150_bce_used_earth_s_shadow: Hipparchus (~150 BCE) yakoresheje igicucu cy'Isi ku Kwezi mu gihe cy'ubwirakabiri kugira ngo agereranye intera.
kinyarwanda.defines_the_astronomical_unit_modern_r: Isobanura igipimo cy'ikirere (AU). Radar za none zipima neza kugeza kuri metero.
kinyarwanda.kepler_s_third_law_distance_from_orbit: Itegeko rya gatatu rya Kepler: intera iva ku gihe cyo kuzenguruka. Ubu byemejwe n'ibyogajuru.
kinyarwanda.earth_s_orbit_gives_2_au_baseline_star: Orbite y'Isi itanga urufatiro rwa 2 AU. Inyenyeri isa n'iyimuka uko ibihe by'umwaka bihinduka.
kinyarwanda.pulsation_period_reveals_true_brightne: Igihe cyo guhinda cyerekana urumuri nyakuri. Gereranya n'urumuri rugaragara ubone intera.
kinyarwanda.same_cepheid_method_extended_to_other_: Uburyo bumwe bwa Cepheid bwagejejwe ku zindi galagisi. Hubble yerekanye mu 1923 ko Andromeda iri hanze ya galagisi yacu.
kinyarwanda.more_distant_galaxies_are_receding_fas: Galagisi ziri kure cyane zitugendaho vuba. v = H × d itanga intera.
kinyarwanda.cosmic_microwave_background_is_light_f: Imirasire ya Mikorowave y'Isanzure ni urumuri rw'imyaka miliyari 13.8 ishize, rwaramburwa no kwagurwa kw'isanzure.
kinyarwanda.light_from_receding_objects_redshifts_: Urumuri ruva ku bintu bitugendaho ruhinduka gutukura; ruva ku byegera, ruhinduka ubururu. Ni ko dupima intera z'isanzure + tukamenya ko isanzure ryagurwa.
kinyarwanda.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Ni ingana iki mu rumuri rw'izuba rugera ku mubumbe rugarurwa ugereranyije n'urufatwa? Ibyo ni byo bigena ubushyuhe bw'umubumbe wose.
kinyarwanda.albedo_fraction_of_light_reflected_ice: Albedo = igice cy'urumuri rugarurwa. Urubura + ibicu bigarura cyane (albedo nini); ubutaka bw'umwijima + amazi birafata (albedo nto). Kugarura kwinshi = umubumbe ukonje kurushaho. Iri ni ryo huriro rya urubura-albedo ritera ibihe by'urubura.
kinyarwanda.13_8_billion_years_compressed_into_a_s: Imyaka miliyari 13.8 yashyizwe mu murongo umwe w'ihitamo. Nyuza uhereye ku ngingo imwe kugeza uyu munsi.
kinyarwanda.spacetime_matter_compressed_to_a_point: Umwanya-igihe + ibintu byakandamirijwe mu kadomo kamwe
kinyarwanda.universe_expands_by_10_in_a_fraction_o: Isanzure ryagurwa inshuro 10²⁶ mu gice cy'isegonda
kinyarwanda.quarks_bind_into_protons_and_neutrons: Kwark zihuza zikora poroton na neutron
kinyarwanda.first_atomic_nuclei_hydrogen_helium_li: Intima za mbere za atomu: hidorojene, heliyumu, litiyumu
kinyarwanda.first_atoms_cmb_photons_released: Atomu za mbere; foton za CMB zirekurwa
kinyarwanda.no_stars_mostly_neutral_hydrogen_dark_: Nta nyenyeri; ahanini hidorojene idafite amashanyarazi + ibintu by'umwijima
kinyarwanda.population_iii_stars_massive_short_liv: Inyenyeri za Population III: nini, z'ubuzima bugufi
kinyarwanda.mergers_create_the_first_galaxy_seeds: Guhurira bikora imbuto za mbere za galagisi
kinyarwanda.most_galaxies_assembled_star_formation: Galagisi nyinshi zarateranye; gukorwa kw'inyenyeri kugera hejuru
kinyarwanda.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Isanzure rifite imyaka miliyari 13.8. Ryatangiye ari rikomeye kandi rishyushye bidapimika, hanyuma ryaguka rikonja. Galagisi zabayeho ku myaka miliyari 1, Izuba ryacu ku myaka miliyari 9, natwe turi hano ku myaka miliyari 13.8.
kinyarwanda.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Kanda kuri asteroyide zigana ku Isi mbere y'uko zigerayo. Nka DART ya NASA yo kurinda imibumbe.
kinyarwanda.real_nasa_program_dart_double_asteroid: Porogaramu nyayo ya NASA: DART (Double Asteroid Redirection Test) yahinduye neza orbite ya Dimorphos mu 2022. Ibiro Bihuriza Hamwe Kurinda Imibumbe bikurikirana ibintu +30,000 biri hafi y'Isi.
kinyarwanda.four_galaxy_morphologies_spirals_like_: Imiterere ine ya galagisi. Iz'ibizunguruzi nk'iyacu zerekana amaboko agaragaza aho inyenyeri zikorerwa. Iz'elipsi ni za kera, izitagira imiterere zifite akajagari.
kinyarwanda.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Umuryango munini ukusanya urumuri rwinshi + ugaragaza ibintu bito. Kwagura ntibifite akamaro kangana n'uko utekereza.
kinyarwanda.aperture_matters_more_than_magnificati: Umuryango ufite akamaro kurusha kwagura! Objectif nini ikusanya urumuri rwinshi + igaragaza ibintu bito. Kwagura kurenze inshuro ~20 kuri cm y'umuryango bituma bijegajega gusa. Indorerwamo ya m 6.5 ya JWST yiga galagisi zo mu myaka miliyoni magana make ya mbere nyuma ya Big Bang.
kinyarwanda.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Kurura umurongo w'uburebure uzamuke mu kirere cy'Isi. Igitutu kiragabanuka, ubushyuhe burahinduka, na shimi ihinduka urwego ku rundi.
kinyarwanda.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Ikirere kibera hano. Ubushyuhe bugabanuka uko uzamuka.
kinyarwanda.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Urwego rwa ozone rufata UV. Ubushyuhe bwiyongera uko uzamuka.
kinyarwanda.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Ibisasu byo mu kirere bitwikira hano. Urwego rukonje kurusha izindi (-90°C).
kinyarwanda.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS izenguruka hano (400km). Aurora iramurika. Umwuka muke cyane ariko ushyushye.
kinyarwanda.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Umupaka ugana mu kirere. Umwuka usohoka ujya mu kirere.
kinyarwanda.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Ibyo Galileo yabonye mu 1610: Venus inyura mu byiciro. Ibyo byerekanye ko Venus izenguruka Izuba, atari Isi.
kinyarwanda.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Icyo Galileo yavumbuye mu 1610: Venus ifite ibyiciro nk'iby'Ukwezi
kinyarwanda.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: Mu 1610 Galileo yarebye Venus muri telesikopi ye abona ko inyura mu byiciro — nk'Ukwezi. Iki cyari ikimenyetso ko Venus izenguruka Izuba, atari Isi. Sisitemu ya Ptolemy ishyira Isi hagati ntishobora gusobanura Venus yuzuye. Ni ikimenyetso gikomeye cy'uko Izuba riri hagati nk'uko Copernicus yabivuze.
kinyarwanda.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Umurima wa magneti wirukana umuyaga w'izuba + urinda ikirere. Mars yabuze byombi; ni yo mpamvu ari ubutayu.
kinyarwanda.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Umurima wa magneti w'Isi wirukana umuyaga mwinshi w'izuba, ukarinda ikirere + ubuzima. Mars yabuze umurima wayo wa magneti mu myaka ~miliyari 4 ishize maze ibura ikirere cyayo buhoro. Jupiter ifite umurima ukomeye kurusha iyindi muri sisitemu y'izuba.
kinyarwanda.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: Hindura hagati y'ireba ry'ubunini n'iry'intera. Byombi ntibishobora kwerekanwa ku gipimo icyarimwe — ni ko ikirere kiri ubusa koko.
kinyarwanda.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: Ni bigoye kwerekana ibipimo nyabyo icyarimwe. Iyo Isi iba ari akashaza, Izuba ryari kuba umupira w'inyanja uri ibirenge 200 uvuye aho. Iyo intera ziri ku gipimo, imibumbe ihinduka ududomo tutagaragara. Ibishushanyo byinshi birahuza.
kinyarwanda.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Koresha imbaraga zo gutindisha kumanuka kwawe. Gwa buhoro kurusha 2.5 m/s cyangwa uzavunika. Genzura lisansi — ntihagije yo guhagarara mu kirere.
kinyarwanda.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 yenda kubura lisansi mu gihe cyo kumanuka ku Kwezi. Neil Armstrong yafashe ubuyobozi mu ntoki asimbura ubuyobozi bw'ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo ashake ahantu horoshye ho kugwa. Bageze hasi hasigaye ~amasegonda 25 ya lisansi.
kinyarwanda.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Hitamo aho ugana + urebe igihe urumuri rufata ngo rugerayo. Hanze ya sisitemu y'izuba, intera ziba nini bitangaje.
kinyarwanda.nearest_large_galaxy: Galagisi nini iri hafi kurusha izindi
kinyarwanda.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Urumuri rugenda 300,000 km/s. Tubona ibintu bya kure uko byari bimeze igihe urumuri rwabivaho. Izuba tubona rifite iminota 8; Proxima Centauri ifite imyaka 4. Galagisi Andromeda ifite imyaka miliyoni 2.5.
kinyarwanda.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Izuba rirasira kandi rirenga hehe neza? Biterwa na latitude yawe + umunsi. Gerageza Maine ugereranyije n'Uruziga rw'Amajyaruguru.
kinyarwanda.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Inzira y'Izuba iterwa na latitude + igihe cy'umwaka. Ku murongo wa ekwateri, izuba rijya hejuru neza. Ku Ruziga rw'Amajyaruguru, izuba rya saa sita z'ijoro ku munsi murebure w'impeshyi + ijoro ry'impera ku munsi mugufi w'itumba. I Portland muri Maine: mu mpeshyi izuba riba hejuru; mu itumba, izuba rirenga rikiri hafi y'aho ijisho rigarukira.
kinyarwanda.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Amezi amwe ashobora kuba afite ubuzima: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede afite inyanja munsi y'ubuso. Ubutumwa burimo gushakisha ubu.
kinyarwanda.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso ifite amazi angana inshuro 2 n'inyanja z'Isi. Ibyanya by'amazi ashyushye bishobora kuba biri hasi mu nyanja. Ubutumwa JUICE + Europa Clipper burakomeje.
kinyarwanda.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini yavumbuye amasoko atera amazi + ibintu ngugu + hidorojene + silika. Shimi y'ayo mazi yerekana ibigize n'inkomoko z'ingufu byashobora gutunga ubuzima.
kinyarwanda.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: Ikirere gikomeye cya N2 + CH4. Ibiyaga bya metani y'amazi ku buso. Inyanja y'amazi-amoniyake hepfo. Ubuzima burashoboka ariko butandukanye cyane.
kinyarwanda.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Ukwezi kunini kurusha andi. Ibimenyetso bikomeye bya Hubble by'inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso. Ubutumwa JUICE buzakwiga.
kinyarwanda.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Ubuso bwa kera kurusha ubundi bugaragara muri sisitemu y'izuba. Inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso irashoboka. Imirasire nkeya kurusha ku yandi mezi ya Jupiter.
kinyarwanda.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Umubiri ufite ibirunga bikora byinshi kurusha indi muri sisitemu y'izuba. Ibirunga 400+ bikora. Ikirere cya diyokiside ya sufure. Ntikitujwe.
kinyarwanda.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Ni iki cyakenerwa kugira ngo Mars ibashe gutuzwa? Hindura gaze y'inzu y'ibimera, gushonga kw'urubura, n'ibimera bipfukirana — reba Mars ihinduka.
kinyarwanda.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Guhindura Mars byafata ibihumbi by'imyaka. Bisaba: gukomeza ikirere (gaze z'inzu y'ibimera), gushyushya ubuso (bigashongesha urubura), kwinjiza ibimera (ogisijene). Ubushakashatsi bwa NASA bwerekana ko CO2 iri kuri Mars ubu ari nkeya cyane ku buryo bitakorwa hatabayeho kuzana byinshi bivuye ahandi. Biracyari ahanini inkuru z'ubuhanga bw'ubumenyi.
kinyarwanda.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble yarebye ahantu ubusa mu kirere iminsi 10 ibona galagisi 3000 za kure. Reba neza + buri gace kijegajega ni galagisi.
kinyarwanda.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Buri gace kijegajega ni galagisi y'inyenyeri miliyoni kugeza kuri magana ya miliyari
kinyarwanda.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: Mu 1995, Hubble yarebye agace gato k'umwijima mu kirere iminsi 10. Icyavuyemo: galagisi 3000 za kure mu ishusho imwe. JWST yagiye kure kurushaho, yiga galagisi zo mu myaka miliyoni magana make ya mbere nyuma ya Big Bang.
kinyarwanda.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Inyenyeri zishyushye zisa n'ubururu; izikonje zisa n'umutuku. Inyenyeri zishyirwa mu byiciro OBAFGKM ku bwoko bwa sipekitoro.
kinyarwanda.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Ingufi itukura — inyenyeri zikonje kandi nyinshi kurusha izindi (75% by'inyenyeri zose)
kinyarwanda.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Ingufi y'oranje — ituje kurusha Izuba, ibaho igihe kirekire
kinyarwanda.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Ubururu — inyenyeri zishyushye kandi nke kurusha izindi, zibaho imyaka miliyoni gusa
kinyarwanda.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Ibara ry'inyenyeri = ubushyuhe. Uburyo bwo kwibuka urukurikirane rwa sipekitoro OBAFGKM (uhereye ku zishyushye ujya ku zikonje): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Inyenyeri zishyushye ni nini + zimurika kurushaho + zibaho igihe gito.
kinyarwanda.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Kuki Ukwezi guhora kwerekana uruhande rumwe? Imbaraga z'imiraba zagabanyije umuvuduko wo kuzenguruka kwako. Reba uko intera + misa bihindura igihe cyo gufatwa.
kinyarwanda.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Imbaraga z'imiraba zigabanya buhoro kuzenguruka kw'ukwezi kugeza kuhuye n'igihe cyako cyo kuzenguruka. Ukwezi kwacu gufashwe n'imiraba: uruhande rumwe ruhora rwerekeye ku Isi. Mercury iri muri resonance ya 3:2 n'Izuba (ntabwo yafashwe rwose).
kinyarwanda.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Kanda kuri buri mwobo. Abahanga b'imibumbe babarura imyobo kugira ngo bamenye imyaka y'ubuso — imyobo myinshi = bwa kera kurushaho.
kinyarwanda.click_craters_to_count_them: 🔍 Kanda ku myobo kugira ngo uyibare
kinyarwanda.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Kubara imyobo ni bwo buryo abahanga bamenya imyaka y'ubuso bw'imibumbe. Imyobo myinshi = ubuso bwa kera. Imisozi y'Ukwezi yuzuye imyobo (ya kera cyane); ibibaya (maria) ni lave nshya.
kinyarwanda.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Misa igoreka umwanya-igihe. Kurura misa + reba umwobo wimbika. Zungurutsa umupira urebe uko ugwamo.
kinyarwanda.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: Relativite rusange ya Einstein ivuga ko misa igoreka umwanya-igihe. Ibintu ntibyumva imbaraga — bikurikira imirongo migufi mu miterere igoretse. Ni yo rukuruzi. Imyobo y'umukara igoreka umwanya-igihe ku buryo ndetse n'urumuri rudasohoka.
kinyarwanda.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Ubwoko butatu bw'asteroyide: C, S, M. Amasosiyete y'ubucukuzi yifuza ubwoko bwa M kubera icyuma + platine.
kinyarwanda.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: Bwinshi kurusha ubundi (75%). Bw'umwijima, bwa kera, bukungahaye ku mazi. Buboneka mu mukandara wo hanze.
kinyarwanda.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Bw'urutare (17%). Bworoheje, bugizwe n'amabuye ya silikate + icyuma. Buboneka mu mukandara wo imbere.
kinyarwanda.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Bukungahaye kuri metali (8%). Ahanini icyuma + nikeli. Bishoboka ko buva ku ntima y'imibumbe ya mbere yavunitse. Intego y'ubucukuzi.
kinyarwanda.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Urumuri rw'imyaka 380,000 nyuma ya Big Bang. Impinduka ntoya ni imbuto za buri galagisi.
kinyarwanda.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Impinduka z'ubushyuhe za hafi 0.001% — imbuto z'imiterere yose
kinyarwanda.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB ni urumuri rwasigaye rwo mu myaka 380,000 nyuma ya Big Bang. Impinduka ntoya z'ubushyuhe zerekana aho ibintu byari byegeranye gato kurushaho. Utwo duce twegeranye twakuze tuba galagisi + inyenyeri zose tubona uyu munsi. Byavumbuwe ku mpanuka na Penzias + Wilson mu 1965 (Igihembo cya Nobel 1978).
kinyarwanda.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Impeta za Saturn ni 99% urubura rw'amazi mu bice tiriyari. Zishobora kuba zifite imyaka miliyoni 100 gusa.
kinyarwanda.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Impeta za Saturn ahanini ni uduce tw'urubura rw'amazi guhera ku mukungugu kugeza ku bice bingana n'inzu. Zirambuye ku km 282,000 ariko zifite ubugari buri munsi ya km 1. Bishoboka ko zavuye ku kwezi kwasenyutse mu myaka ~miliyoni 100 ishize — ni nshya!
kinyarwanda.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Hitamo intima, ubuso, ikirere, n'ubuzima. Reba ubwoko bw'isi wakoze.
kinyarwanda.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar ni inyenyeri za neutron zizunguruka zifite imirasire ya magneti. Isi ibona urumuri gusa iyo umurasire unyuze.
kinyarwanda.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Pulsar ni inyenyeri ya neutron izenguruka vuba cyane. Impera zayo za magneti zisohora imirasire. Tubona urumuri gusa iyo umurasire unyuze aho turi — nk'itara ryo ku nyanja. Zimwe zimurika inshuro 700 kuri isegonda. Jocelyn Bell Burnell yavumbuye iya mbere mu 1967.
kinyarwanda.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Umugezi w'uduce dufite amashanyarazi uva ku Zuba, ugakubita Isi. Umuyaga ukomeye = aurora nyinshi + kuvogera GPS.
kinyarwanda.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Umuyaga w'izuba ni umugezi w'uduce dufite amashanyarazi (ahanini poroton + elegitoro) utemba buri gihe uva ku Zuba. Umuvuduko uhindagurika 250-800 km/s. Inkubi zikomeye zitera aurora + zishobora kuvogera GPS + imiyoboro y'amashanyarazi. Ikibazo cya Carrington 1859: telegarafu zaturikanye zigafata umuriro.
kinyarwanda.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS izenguruka Isi buri minota 90. Rimwe iba mu zuba, ubundi iba mu gicucu cy'Isi.
kinyarwanda.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS izenguruka ku km 400 hejuru ku muvuduko wa 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h). Irangiza uruzenguruko rumwe buri minota 90 — bityo abogajuru babona izuba rirasa n'irirenga inshuro 16 ku munsi. ISS ni cyo kintu kinini kurusha ibindi abantu bigeze bubaka mu kirere.
kinyarwanda.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: Voyager 1 + 2 zoherejwe mu 1977. Ubu ziri mu kirere kiri hagati y'inyenyeri; Voyager 1 yanyuze heliopause mu 2012 na Voyager 2 mu 2018.
kinyarwanda.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: Voyager 1 + 2 zoherejwe mu 1977 kwiga imibumbe yo hanze. Zombi zanyuze heliopause (umupaka w'umuyaga w'izuba) mu 2012 + 2018 — ubu ziri mu kirere kiri hagati y'inyenyeri. Buri imwe itwaye Golden Record ifite indamukanyo + umuziki ku bantu b'ahandi bazishobora kubona.
kinyarwanda.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury inyura imbere y'Izuba buri myaka mike. Reba inyura — ariko gusa ukoresheje akayunguruzo k'izuba kabigenewe.
kinyarwanda.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Reba ukoresheje AKAYUNGURUZO k'izuba KABIGENEWE gusa — NTUKIGERE UREBA IZUBA WERA!
kinyarwanda.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Kunyura kubaho iyo Mercury (cyangwa Venus) inyuze hagati y'Isi + Izuba. Bisa n'akadomo gato kirabura ku Zuba. Kunyura kwa Mercury gukurikira: 13 Ugushyingo 2032. Kunyura kwa Venus gukurikira: Ukuboza 2117 — ntikuzongera kubaho kugeza 2125.
kinyarwanda.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault mu 1851 yerekanye ko Isi izenguruka akoresheje pandule nini. Urwego rwo kunyeganyega rwayo ruzenguruka vuba ku mpera.
kinyarwanda.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault mu 1851 yerekanye ukuzenguruka kw'Isi akoresheje pandule nini. Urwego rwo kunyeganyega rwayo rusa n'aho ruzenguruka kuko Isi izenguruka munsi yarwo. Ku mpera: amasaha 24. Ku murongo wa ekwateri: nta na rimwe. Muri Maine: ~amasaha 34.
kinyarwanda.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Impera y'amajyaruguru ya Saturn ifite inkubi y'impande esheshatu itunganye y'ubugari bwa km 30,000. Yavumbuwe na Voyager mu 1981.
kinyarwanda.saturn_s_hexagonal_pole_storm: Inkubi y'Impande Esheshatu ku Mpera ya Saturn
kinyarwanda.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: Ikiranga gihoraho cy'ubugari bwa km 30,000 — kirenze inshuro 2 umurambararo w'Isi
kinyarwanda.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn ifite inkubi y'impande esheshatu itunganye ku mpera yayo y'amajyaruguru — yafatiwe amashusho bwa mbere na Voyager (1981), byemezwa na Cassini. Izo mpande esheshatu zifite ubugari bwa km 30,000 kandi zirahoraho. Kuki ari impande esheshatu? Imiterere y'umuyaga ukomeye wo mu kirere + imiraba ya Rossby.
kinyarwanda.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Isaha ya mbere. Uko Izuba rinyura mu kirere, gnomon ita igicucu kizenguruka kigaragaza amasaha.
kinyarwanda.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Amasaha y'izuba yabanjirije amasaha ya none mu binyejana byinshi. Uko Izuba rinyura mu kirere, igicucu cya gnomon kirazenguruka. Abanyamisiri ba kera, Abagereki, Abaroma, n'Abashinwa bose bubatse amasaha y'izuba anoze. Ay'ubu agomba kunozwa ku gihe cy'izuba + ikigereranyo cy'igihe.
kinyarwanda.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: Galagisi 80 zirambuye ku myaka-rumuri miliyoni 10 hafi yacu. Nzira Nyamata + Andromeda zishobora kugongana mu myaka miliyari 4-5 — ubushakashatsi bwo mu 2025 buvuga ko amahirwe ari hafi 50/50.
kinyarwanda.25k_ly_closest_to_mw: Imyaka-rumuri 25k — iri hafi ya MW kurusha izindi
kinyarwanda.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Itsinda ry'Ahantu Hegereye — galagisi ~80 mu myaka-rumuri miliyoni 10
kinyarwanda.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Itsinda ryacu ry'Ahantu Hegereye rifite galagisi ~80 ziyobowe na Nzira Nyamata + Andromeda. Andromeda iregera ku muvuduko wa 110 km/s — kugongana birashoboka mu myaka miliyari 4-5. Nibiba: galagisi nini Milkomeda.
kinyarwanda.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Asteroyide ingana ite yica urwego rw'ubuhe buzima? Gereranya kuva ku kabuye gato kugeza ku cyishe dinozoro.
kinyarwanda.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Kwinjira mu kirere gusenya amabuye menshi ari munsi ya m 5. Chelyabinsk 2013 (m 20) yamennye amadirishya ariko nta mwobo. Tunguska 1908 (m 50) yahiritse ishyamba rya km² 2000. Chicxulub imyaka miliyoni 66 ishize (km 10) yishe dinozoro.
kinyarwanda.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: CME irasa miliyari z'ibiro bya plazima ziva ku Zuba. Nyuma y'iminsi, ishobora gutera aurora nziza + gutuma GPS ipfa.
kinyarwanda.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Gusohoka kwa Misa ya Korona kurasa miliyari z'ibiro bya plazima mu kirere ku muvuduko wa miliyoni 1-2 mph. Bifata iminsi 1-5 kugera ku Isi. CME zikomeye zitera inkubi za jewomagnetike, aurora zisa neza, kandi zishobora kuvogera ibyogajuru + imiyoboro y'amashanyarazi.
kinyarwanda.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid zimurika ku ruziga ruhoraho. Igihe cyazo cyerekana urumuri rwazo nyakuri — ni umurongo w'ipima w'isanzure.
kinyarwanda.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Cepheid zihindagurika zimurika ku ruziga ruhoraho. Igihe cyazo gifitanye isano itaziguye n'urumuri rwazo bwite (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Abahanga bapima icyo gihe + bakagikoresha kugira ngo bamenye urumuri nyakuri + intera.
kinyarwanda.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Ama orbite atangira ku ruziga akagera ku ma elipsi maremare. Hindura eksantirisite ushushanye inzira zisa n'iz'imibumbe cyangwa iz'inyenyeri z'imirizo.
kinyarwanda.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Eksantirisite y'orbite iva kuri 0 (uruziga rutunganye) igera kuri 1 (kuva mu isanzure ku buryo bwa parabole). Imibumbe iri hafi y'uruziga. Inyenyeri z'imirizo zifite elipsi ikabije — zegera Izuba cyane + zikajya kure mu isanzure ryo hanze. Ama orbite ya hiperbole (e>1) bivuze kunyura rimwe gusa muri sisitemu y'izuba.
kinyarwanda.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Ikirere cy'Isi gihagarika uburebure bw'imiraba bwinshi. Urumuri rugaragara, radiyo, na bimwe mu nfarageru bigera hasi.
kinyarwanda.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Urumuri rugaragara, imiraba ya radiyo, na bimwe mu nfarageru bigera hasi
kinyarwanda.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Ikirere cy'Isi gihagarika uburebure bw'imiraba bwinshi. Urumuri rugaragara, radiyo, n'amadirishya amwe y'infarageru bigera hasi; ubumenyi bw'ikirere bwa UV, X, gama, n'infarageru nyinshi busaba ibigo byo mu kirere nka Hubble, JWST, Chandra, na Fermi.
kinyarwanda.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Sipekitoro zerekana ubushyuhe, ibigize, ukugenda, n'ibimenyetso by'icyiciro cy'iterambere cy'ikintu.
kinyarwanda.expanding_ejecta_thousands_km_s: Ibisohotse birimo kwaguka: ibihumbi bya km/s
kinyarwanda.spectral_line_strength_caution: Imbaraga z'umurongo si igipimo cyoroshye cy'ubwinshi: ubushyuhe, ubwinshi, na ionizasiyo na byo bigena ibiranga bigaragara cyane. Izi mbago ni moderi zoroshye zo kwigisha.
kinyarwanda.spectra_life_paths_note: Izi ngero si urutonde rumwe rw'igihe: inyenyeri isa n'Izuba ishobora kuba igihangange gitukura na nebule y'umubumbe, mu gihe supernova y'ubwoko bwa II irangiza ubuzima bw'inyenyeri nini.
kinyarwanda.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Isi izenguruka 15° ku isaha. Reba igihe ari saa sita i Tokyo, n'igihe izuba rirasira i Portland.
kinyarwanda.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Isi izenguruka 15° ku isaha. UTC (Igihe Mpuzamahanga Gihuriweho) ni cyo gipimo cy'isi yose. Uturere tw'igihe dutandukanywa n'amasaha ±. Portland muri Maine ni UTC-5 (EST) cyangwa UTC-4 (EDT). Ku isi hose, kimwe cya kabiri cy'Isi kiba mu zuba mu gihe ikindi kiba mu ijoro.
kinyarwanda.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Kanda unyure ku bintu 12 by'ubumenyi bw'ikirere birenze ubwenge busanzwe.
kinyarwanda.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Ibishushanyo byo mu bitabo birabeshya. Ukwezi kuri kure cyane kurusha uko bishushanywa. Reba igipimo nyakuri.
kinyarwanda.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Ibitabo byinshi bishushanya Ukwezi kunini cyane + kwegereye cyane. Ukuri: umurambararo w'Ukwezi ni 1/4 cy'uw'Isi, kandi intera igera ku Kwezi ni ~imirambararo 30 y'Isi. Urumuri rufata amasegonda 1.3 kugira ngo rugende urwo rugendo.
kinyarwanda.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter ifite umunsi mugufi kurusha iyindi (amasaha 10). Venus ifite muremure kurusha iyindi (iminsi 243 y'Isi!).
kinyarwanda.day_length_across_the_solar_system_log: Uburebure bw'umunsi muri Sisitemu y'Izuba (igipimo cya log)
kinyarwanda.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter izenguruka vuba. Venus izenguruka buhoro kurusha umwaka wayo.
kinyarwanda.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Ibihangange bya gaze bizenguruka vuba kubera uko byakozwe. Venus izenguruka buhoro kurusha izindi, wenda bitewe n'imiraba y'izuba + gukururwa n'ikirere gikomeye. Isi igenda igabanya umuvuduko wa ~milisegonda 1.7 ku kinyejana bitewe na rukuruzi y'Ukwezi.
kinyarwanda.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bupfukirana imirongo mifunganye. Inzira y'ubwirakabiri bwo mu 2024 yanyuze mu majyaruguru ya Maine.
kinyarwanda.april_8_2024_total_solar_eclipse_path: Inzira y'Ubwirakabiri Bwuzuye bw'Izuba bwo ku ya 8 Mata 2024
kinyarwanda.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bw'izuba bubaho gusa ku nzira nyoroheje z'ubugari bwa ~km 100-150. Ubwirakabiri bwo ku ya 8 Mata 2024 bwanyuze mu majyaruguru ya Maine — Abanyamaine benshi bagiye mu majyaruguru kubona ubwuzuye. Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bukurikira buzabonwa muri Maine: 1 Gicurasi 2079.
kinyarwanda.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Kalendari y'Isanzure ya Sagan: imyaka miliyari 13.8 mu mwaka umwe. Abantu bagera mu isegonda ya nyuma.
kinyarwanda.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Kalendari y'Isanzure ya Carl Sagan: ihuza imyaka miliyari 13.8 mu mwaka 1. Big Bang = 1 Mutarama. Ubu = 31 Ukuboza saa sita z'ijoro. Abantu bagaragaye mu masegonda ya nyuma. Imico ibaho mu gice gito cy'isegonda ya nyuma.
kinyarwanda.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Imico y'abanyamahanga ingahe? Hindura buri kintu kitazwi + urebe igisubizo.
kinyarwanda.in_our_milky_way_galaxy_at_any_time: muri Galagisi yacu ya Nzira Nyamata igihe icyo ari cyo cyose
kinyarwanda.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: Umubare w'ituwe kuri buri sisitemu
kinyarwanda.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake 1961: kugereranya izindi mico. Ibintu byinshi ntibizwi — ibisubizo biva kuri <1 (turi twenyine) bikagera kuri miliyoni. Bigaragaza ibyo tutazi kurusha uko bitanga igisubizo. Hindura imirongo y'ihitamo urebe uko igisubizo gihinduka vuba.
kinyarwanda.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Telesikopi cumi n'ebyiri nini kandi nziza kurusha izindi: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, n'ibyo zireba.
kinyarwanda.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Telesikopi yo mu kirere ya optike/UV/IR. Imaze imyaka 30+ ikora.
kinyarwanda.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Telesikopi yo mu kirere y'infarageru. Iri ku kibanza cya Lagrange L2.
kinyarwanda.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Telesikopi ebyiri za m 10 kuri Mauna Kea, Hawaii.
kinyarwanda.eso_chile_four_8_2m_telescopes: ESO muri Shili, telesikopi enye za m 8.2.
kinyarwanda.twin_8m_mauna_kea_cerro_pach_n: Ebyiri za m 8: Mauna Kea + Cerro Pachón.
kinyarwanda.66_antenna_radio_array_chilean_desert: Urukurikirane rwa radiyo rw'antene 66, mu butayu bwa Shili.
kinyarwanda.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Telesikopi yo mu kirere ya optike/UV/IR. Iracyakora.
kinyarwanda.nasa_x_ray_space_telescope: Telesikopi yo mu kirere y'imirasire X ya NASA.
kinyarwanda.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Telesikopi yo mu kirere y'infarageru, yahagaritswe mu 2020.
kinyarwanda.japanese_8_2m_on_mauna_kea: Iy'Ubuyapani ya m 8.2 kuri Mauna Kea.
kinyarwanda.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Telesikopi ya radiyo izaza, Ositaraliya + Afurika y'Epfo.
kinyarwanda.coming_39m_eso_telescope_chile: Telesikopi ya ESO ya m 39 izaza. Shili.
kinyarwanda.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Telesikopi cumi n'ebyiri zikomeye kurusha izindi ku isi. Umuryango (cm) ni umurambararo w'indorerwamo y'ibanze. Umuryango munini = urumuri rwinshi + ibintu bito bigaragara. Telesikopi zo mu kirere zirinda kugoreka kw'ikirere.
kinyarwanda.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Inyenyeri nini zibaho vuba zigapfa zikiri nto. Hindura misa + urebe igihe inyenyeri imara itwika.
kinyarwanda.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Inyenyeri nini zitwika lisansi vuba. Ubuzima ∝ M^-2.5. Izuba: imyaka miliyari 10 (turi hagati). 10 M☉: imyaka miliyoni 30 gusa. Ingufi itukura ya 0.1 M☉: imyaka tiriyari.
kinyarwanda.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: Kurikirana aho ugeze: imibumbe wasuye, amanota wabonye, ubutumwa wanditse.
kinyarwanda.this_tool_features_35_interactive_mini: Iki gikoresho gifite ibikoresho bito 35+ bikorana n'umukoresha birebana n'ubumenyi bw'ikirere, fizika, n'ubushakashatsi. Uhereye kuri simulation y'imyobo y'umukara ukageza ku kuguruka ku byogajuru bimanuka ku Kwezi, ushobora gushakashaka Sisitemu y'Izuba n'ibirenze.
kinyarwanda.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: Ibyagezweho 16 kuva ku bumenyi bw'ikirere bw'Abagereki ba kera kugeza kuri JWST. Amazina ugomba kumenya.
kinyarwanda.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Urugendo rw'imyaka 2300 kuva Aristarchus kugeza JWST. Buri cyavumbuwe cyubatswe ku cyakibanjirije. Ubumenyi ni isiganwa ry'itanga-ryakira — buri muhanga w'ikirere ahagarara ku bitugu by'abamubanjirije.
kinyarwanda.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Gereranya ibyiciro by'ubushyuhe bw'ubuso n'ibimenyetso bya sipekitoro bibiranga.
kinyarwanda.spectral_class_size_caution: Ubunini bw'uduziga bwashyizweho bungana ku bushake. Icyiciro cya sipekitoro gisobanura ubushyuhe n'imiterere y'imirongo, si rayo cyangwa urumuri ubwarwo; icyiciro cy'urumuri V gisobanura urukurikirane rukuru, III gisobanura igihangange, na I gisobanura igihangange kinini.
kinyarwanda.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Inyuguti imwe ishobora kuba ku nyenyeri zitandukanye cyane: Proxima Centauri ni ingufi ya M, naho Betelgeuse ni igihangange kinini cya M. Izuba ni G2 V.
kinyarwanda.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars ifite umwuka woroheje inshuro 100 ahanini ugizwe na CO₂. Gereranya ibigize gaze + igitutu.
kinyarwanda.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Ikirere cya Mars ni cyoroheje inshuro 100 kurusha icy'Isi. Ibigize: 95% CO₂. Kugira ngo uhumeke kuri Mars wakenera ogisijene + igitutu inshuro 100 kurushaho. Nta azote ihagije yo kuvubura.
kinyarwanda.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: Amagambo 10 y'ingenzi y'umwobo w'umukara: umupaka w'ibyabaye, ingingo imwe, spaghettification, imirasire ya Hawking.
kinyarwanda.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Event Horizon Telescope yafashe ishusho ya mbere y'umwobo w'umukara M87* (2019) + Sgr A* (2022). Impeta y'oranje = urumuri rugoretse hafi y'umupira w'umukara aho urumuri rudashobora gusohoka.
kinyarwanda.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Imibumbe itanu ifite aurora. Iy'Isi ni icyatsi/umutuku, iya Jupiter ni yo ikomeye kurusha izindi, iya Mars iratatanye.
kinyarwanda.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: Icyatsi (ogisijene) + umutuku (O ya atomu) + ubururu (azote). Ibonwa neza hafi y'impera za magneti.
kinyarwanda.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Ikomeye kurusha izindi muri sisitemu y'izuba. Iterwa n'ibirunga bya Io + umurima wa magneti wa Jupiter. Aurora ya UV ihoraho.
kinyarwanda.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Iterwa n'umuyaga w'izuba. Ntifite amabara menshi nk'iy'Isi ariko ni nini. Imara iminsi myinshi.
kinyarwanda.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: Ifite icyerekezo gitangaje kubera kunama kw'umurongo kwa 98°. Bigoye kuyifata amashusho.
kinyarwanda.weak_no_global_magnetic_field_auroras_: Iroroheje — nta murima wa magneti w'umubumbe wose. Aurora iba hafi y'utuce twa magneti dusigaye mu gishishwa.
kinyarwanda.10_missions_that_defined_planetary_exp: Ubutumwa 10 bwaranze ubushakashatsi bw'imibumbe. Kuva kuri Apollo kugeza Cassini kugeza JWST.
kinyarwanda.first_humans_walk_on_moon: Abantu ba mbere bagenda ku Kwezi
kinyarwanda.first_mars_landers_life_experiments: Ibyogajuru bya mbere byaguye kuri Mars + ibigeragezo by'ubuzima
kinyarwanda.nuclear_powered_rover_still_active: Rover ikoresha ingufu za nikleyeri, iracyakora
kinyarwanda.first_close_up_of_pluto_arrokoth: Amashusho ya mbere ya hafi ya Pluto + Arrokoth
kinyarwanda.first_planetary_defense_test: Ikigeragezo cya mbere cyo kurinda imibumbe
kinyarwanda.rover_first_mars_helicopter: Rover + kajugujugu ya mbere ya Mars
kinyarwanda.replaced_hubble_for_infrared_deep_fiel: Yuzuza Hubble ku bibaya byimbitse by'infarageru
kinyarwanda.brightness_counts_backward_smaller_bri: Urumuri rubarwa rusubira inyuma: gito = rumurika kurushaho. Urwego rugaragara rurambuye ku bipimo 60.
kinyarwanda.faintest_naked_eye: Iyoroheje kurusha izindi ijisho ryera ribona
kinyarwanda.backyard_scope_limit: Urugero rwa telesikopi yo mu rugo
kinyarwanda.magnitudes_count_backward_smaller_brig: Ibipimo bibarwa BISUBIRA INYUMA: gito = rumurika kurushaho. Buri ntambwe ya 5 = kumurika inshuro 100. Hipparchus yabihimbye mu 130 BCE. Izuba: -26.7. JWST ibona kugeza ku gipimo 34. Ni ukuvuga: 100^((34-(-26))/5) ≈ inshuro 10^24 zoroheje kurusha Izuba.
kinyarwanda.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Uburyo bune abahanga b'ikirere basobanuramo ibibanza mu kirere.
kinyarwanda.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Ibipimo bishingiye ku nyenyeri. Ascension droite (h:m:s) + Déclinaison (°). Bikoreshwa muri katalogi z'ikirere.
kinyarwanda.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Bishingiye ku ureba. Uburebure (hejuru y'aho ijisho rigarukira) + Azimut (uhereye mu majyaruguru). Bikoreshwa mu kwerekeza telesikopi.
kinyarwanda.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Ishingiye ku rwego Izuba-Isi. Ikoreshwa ku bintu bya sisitemu y'izuba.
kinyarwanda.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Ishingiye ku rwego rwa Nzira Nyamata. Ikoreshwa mu bushakashatsi bwa galagisi.
kinyarwanda.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Abahanga b'ikirere bakoresha sisitemu nyinshi z'ibipimo. Iy'ekwateri ni iy'isi yose + ibintu bigumana ibipimo bimwe mu gihe Isi izenguruka. Alt-Az ihinduka buri kanya uko Isi izenguruka. Iya galagisi ni yo nziza mu kwiga imiterere ya Nzira Nyamata.
kinyarwanda.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Kuva ku Zuba 1 kugeza ku nyenyeri 10^22. Ubunini bw'isanzure buratangaje.
kinyarwanda.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Ubumenyi bw'ikirere bukorera ku bipimo bidasanzwe. « Inyenyeri zingahe? » — zirenze imyanya y'umusenyi ku nkombe zose z'Isi. « Zifite imyaka ingahe? » — miliyari 13.8. Nyamara ibindi bipimo (kwiyoyoka kw'umwobo w'umukara) ni binini kurushaho.
kinyarwanda.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: Ibintu 36,500 bizenguruka Isi ku burebure butandukanye. Nyuza umurongo w'uburebure urebe ibihari.
kinyarwanda.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: Ibintu 36,500 bikurikiranwa + miliyoni z'ibice bizenguruka Isi. Akaga ka Kessler Syndrome: urukurikirane rwo kugongana rutuma ikirere kitakoreshwa. SpaceX Starlink ifite ibyogajuru 5000+; iteganya ibindi byinshi.
kinyarwanda.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Buri muco ubona inkuru mu nyenyeri. Kuva ku ntwari z'Abagereki kugeza kuri Emu yo mu Kirere y'Abasangwabutaka.
kinyarwanda.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Inkuru zashyizwe ku nyenyeri n'imico yo ku isi hose. Emu yo mu Kirere y'Abasangwabutaka ba Ositaraliya ikoresha ibicu by'umukungugu w'umwijima. Abagenzi bo muri Polineziya bakoresha inyenyeri kugira ngo bayobore mu nyanja ya Pasifika babyibutse. Ubumenyi bw'ikirere ni no kuvuga inkuru.
kinyarwanda.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: Uburyo 5 abahanga b'ikirere babonamo imibumbe hafi y'izindi nyenyeri. Kunyura + Doppler ni byo byiganje.
kinyarwanda.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Reba inyenyeri ushakisha kugabanuka gato k'urumuri iyo umubumbe unyuze imbere. Bwakoreshejwe na Kepler + TESS.
kinyarwanda.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Rukuruzi y'umubumbe ituma inyenyeri yawo ijegajega. Tubona uko kujegajega nk'impinduka ya Doppler mu rumuri rw'inyenyeri.
kinyarwanda.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: Rukuruzi y'inyenyeri+umubumbe binyura igoreka urumuri rw'inyenyeri iri kure kurushaho. Ntibiterwa n'intera.
kinyarwanda.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Hagarika urumuri rw'inyenyeri + ufate amafoto y'imibumbe iri hafi. Kugeza ubu bikora gusa ku mibumbe minini/iri kure.
kinyarwanda.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Impinduka mu mirasire ya pulsar zerekana imibiri izenguruka. Exoplanets za mbere zabonetse muri ubu buryo (1992).
kinyarwanda.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Exoplanet ya mbere hafi y'inyenyeri isa n'Izuba: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Ubu 6,300+ zemejwe. JWST irimo gukora sipekitoroskopi y'ikirere kuri exoplanets — ishakisha ibimenyetso by'ubuzima.
kinyarwanda.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: Gahunda y'ubwirakabiri 2024-2079. Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bw'izuba bukurikira muri Maine: 2079.
kinyarwanda.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bw'izuba ni gake. Hafi rimwe buri mezi 18 ahantu runaka ku Isi, ariko buri bumwe bubonwa gusa ku nzira ifunganye. Ubwirakabiri bw'ukwezi bubonwa ku ruhande rwose rw'ijoro.
kinyarwanda.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Ishyirwa mu byiciro rya Hubble: ibizunguruzi, elipsi, izidafite imiterere + ibiri hagati.
kinyarwanda.tight_arms_big_central_bulge: Amaboko yegeranye, ikibyimba kinini cyo hagati
kinyarwanda.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble yashyize galagisi mu byiciro mu 1936 — « ikanya cya Hubble ». Ibizunguruzi + elipsi + izidafite imiterere. Galagisi zikura zihurira — Nzira Nyamata iri hagati y'ubuzima bwayo; guhurira na Andromeda bishobora kuza mu myaka miliyari (ubushakashatsi bwo mu 2025 buvuga ko amahirwe ari hafi 50/50).
kinyarwanda.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Kuva ku kugenda n'amaguru kugeza ku muvuduko w'urumuri (igipimo cya log). Voyager 1 ni cyo kintu cyakozwe n'abantu kiri kure kurusha ibindi kandi ni kimwe mu byogajuru byacu byihuta bigana hanze, ariko kiracyagenda buhoro cyane ugereranyije n'isanzure.
kinyarwanda.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 yihuta ugereranyije n'ibindi byogajuru kandi ubu ni cyo kintu cyakozwe n'abantu kiri kure kurusha ibindi, nyamara cyakenera imyaka ~80,000 ngo kigere ku nyenyeri iri hafi kurusha izindi. Urumuri rukora urwo rugendo mu myaka 4.
kinyarwanda.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Reba inyenyeri zikorwa kuva ku mukungugu ukonje kugeza ku zuba rishyushye. Ibyiciro 6 mu myaka miliyoni mike.
kinyarwanda.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: Inyenyeri zivukira mu matsinda zivuye mu bicu binini bya molekile. Igikorwa cyose: imyaka miliyoni mike. Ingero zizwi: Nebule ya Orion (M42), Nebule ya Kagoma (Inkingi z'Iremwa), Nebule ya Tarantula.
kinyarwanda.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: Ibibazo 10 byimbitse kurusha ibindi bitarasubizwa muri kosimoloji. Bimwe bifite ibisubizo bike; ibindi ni amayobera nyayo.
kinyarwanda.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Imbonerahamwe yihuse y'ibiranga imibumbe. Umurambararo, rukuruzi, uburebure bw'umunsi, amezi.
kinyarwanda.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Ugereranya uruhande ku rundi rw'ibiranga by'ingenzi by'imibumbe. Isi = urwego rw'ibanze. Izuba rifite umurambararo ungana n'inshuro 109 z'uw'Isi (kurenza inshuro miliyoni ubunini bwaryo). Jupiter ifite amezi 115 azwi. Venus izenguruka buhoro ku buryo umunsi wayo urenza umwaka wayo.
kinyarwanda.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: Ibikoresho bito 40+ bigaragara + bikorana n'umukoresha. Byakorewe abanyeshuri n'abakuru bashaka kumenya.
kinyarwanda.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: Ibikoresho bito 40+ bikorana n'umukoresha, amashusho ya SVG, na simulation z'uburezi.
kinyarwanda.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Kuva ku ruziga rw'ibyiciro by'ukwezi kugeza ku mwerekanyi w'umwobo w'umukara kugeza kuri pandule ya Foucault, buri gikoresho cyubatswe kugira ngo ibitekerezo bidafatika bigaragare + bikinishwe.
kinyarwanda.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: Cyakorewe K-12 + abakuru bashaka kumenya. Fungura ibikoresho byose, cyangwa kimwe gusa — buri kimwe gikora ubwacyo.
kinyarwanda.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: Ni igice cya AlloFlow STEM Lab. Cyubatswe muri Maine, USA. Amakuru yose yavuye kuri NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + inkomoko z'ubumenyi rusange. Gukoreshwa mu burezi ni ubuntu.
kinyarwanda.meteor_shower_calendar: ☄ Kalendari y'Imvura y'Ibisasu byo mu Kirere
kinyarwanda.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: Imvura 9 z'ibisasu byo mu kirere za buri mwaka + iminsi myiza yo kubireba. Andika mu kalendari yawe.
kinyarwanda.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Imvura y'ibisasu byo mu kirere ibaho iyo Isi inyuze mu myanda y'inyenyeri y'umurizo. Igihe cyiza cyo kureba: ahantu h'umwijima, Ukwezi kudahari, nyuma ya saa sita z'ijoro. Perseids + Geminids ni zo mvura za buri mwaka zizewe kurusha izindi.
kinyarwanda.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: Amagambo 10 y'abahanga b'ikirere + abagenzi bo mu kirere agaragaza gutangara.
kinyarwanda.tonight_sky_observing_guide: 🔭 Ubuyobozi bwo Kureba Ikirere Muri Iri Joro
kinyarwanda.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: Ibintu 10 ushobora kubona muri iri joro ukoresheje amaso yawe gusa cyangwa binokuli.
kinyarwanda.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Kureba neza n'amaso yera: ahantu h'umwijima (kure y'amatara y'umujyi), Ukwezi kuri munsi y'aho ijisho rigarukira, amaso yamenyereye umwijima (iminota 20-30 mu mwijima). Za porogaramu z'ubuntu: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk zifasha kumenya icyo urimo kureba.
kinyarwanda.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Ibitekerezo bya Carl Sagan bikunze kuvugwa kurusha ibindi. Pikiseli imwe irimo buri wese twigeze kumenya.
kinyarwanda.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: « Uhereye kuri iyi ntera ya kure, Isi ishobora kuba isa n'aho itagira icyo imaze. Ariko kuri twe, ni ukundi. Ongera urebe ako kadomo. Ni hano. Ni iwacu. Ni twe. Kuri ko, buri wese ukunda, buri wese uzi, buri wese wigeze kumva bavuga, buri muntu wese wabayeho, yamaze ubuzima bwe. »
kinyarwanda.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 yafashe iyi foto y'Isi iri mu ntera ya km miliyari 6 ku ya 14 Gashyantare 1990 — byasabwe na Carl Sagan. Isi ni pikiseli imwe. Buri muntu wese mu mateka yabayeho kuri iyo pikiseli.
kinyarwanda.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: Ibintu 8 bizwi byo mu kirere cyimbitse. Ahavukira inyenyeri, ibishishwa by'inyenyeri zipfa, ibisigazwa bya supernova.
kinyarwanda.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Ahavukira inyenyeri hafite ubugari bw'imyaka-rumuri 24. Habonwa n'amaso yera mu Nkota ya Orion.
kinyarwanda.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Ibisigazwa bya supernova yabonywe mu 1054 CE. Irimo pulsar.
kinyarwanda.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Nebule y'umubumbe muri Lyra. Igishishwa kimurika cy'inyenyeri isa n'Izuba iri gupfa.
kinyarwanda.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Aho Inkingi z'Iremwa ziri (Hubble 1995). Inkingi zikorerwamo inyenyeri.
kinyarwanda.complex_planetary_nebula_many_shell_la: Nebule y'umubumbe igoye. Inzego nyinshi z'ibishishwa ziturutse ku guhinda.
kinyarwanda.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Nebule y'umubumbe iri hafi kurusha izindi. Isa n'ijisho mu kirere.
kinyarwanda.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: Iri mu Gicu Kinini cya Magellan. Agace kanini kurusha utundi kazwi aho inyenyeri zikorerwa.
kinyarwanda.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Ibisigazwa bya supernova by'imyaka ~8000. Imirongo minini muri Cygnus.
kinyarwanda.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Icyo ukeneye kugira ngo utangire kureba — kuva kuri porogaramu z'ubuntu kugeza kuri telesikopi zihuye n'ingengo y'imari iyo ari yo yose.
kinyarwanda.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Porogaramu y'ubuntu ya planetariyumu. Yerekana ikirere cya nijoro ahantu hose, igihe cyose.
kinyarwanda.phone_app_point_at_sky_to_identify_wha: Porogaramu ya telefoni. Yerekeze ku kirere kugira ngo imenye icyo urimo kureba.
kinyarwanda.interactive_3d_solar_system_jwst_missi: Sisitemu y'izuba ya 3D ikorana n'umukoresha + JWST + kwerekana ubutumwa.
kinyarwanda.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Igikoresho cyiza cyo gutangiraho. Kigaragaza amezi ya Galileo ya Jupiter, Andromeda, itsinda rya Pleiades.
kinyarwanda.celestron_starsense_explorer_102_or_or: Celestron StarSense Explorer 102 or Orion 4.5" Newtonian.
kinyarwanda.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE or Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
kinyarwanda.local_astronomy_club: Ikigo cy'ubumenyi bw'ikirere cyo mu karere kawe
kinyarwanda.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Imijyi myinshi ifite kimwe. Abanyamuryango batiza telesikopi, barigisha, bakanategura iminsi yo kureba inyenyeri.
kinyarwanda.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Genda iminota 30+ mu modoka kure y'amatara y'umujyi. Maine yuzuye ahantu nk'aho. Katahdin Woods and Waters ni ahantu hemewe h'ikirere cy'umwijima.
kinyarwanda.most_important_tool_dark_sky_light_pol: Igikoresho cy'ingenzi kurusha ibindi: ikirere cy'umwijima. Umwanda w'urumuri usibanganya 90% by'inyenyeri. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM na AMC Maine Woods ni ahantu hemewe ku rwego mpuzamahanga h'ikirere cy'umwijima; Acadia na Baxter na ho hatanga ikirere cy'umwijima cyiza cyane.
kinyarwanda.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Iherezo ry'inyenyeri riterwa na misa yayo: ingufi y'ikigina, ingufi yera, inyenyeri ya neutron, cyangwa umwobo w'umukara.
kinyarwanda.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Uko inyenyeri ipfa biterwa hafi ya byose na misa yayo y'ibanze. Umupaka uri hagati y'inyenyeri ya neutron n'umwobo w'umukara ntuzwi neza (umupaka wa Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff ~2-3 M☉ ku gisigaye).
kinyarwanda.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: Kuva kuri km 1 kugeza ku myaka-rumuri miliyari 93. Imbonerahamwe y'ibipimo by'isanzure.
kinyarwanda.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Intera zisimburana ku bipimo: km kuri AU kuri myaka-rumuri kuri miliyari z'imyaka-rumuri. Buri ntambwe ni ~inshuro 10,000-100,000 nini kurushaho. Ubumenyi bw'ikirere bubaho ku gipimo cya log.
kinyarwanda.maine_night_sky_by_season: 🌲 Ikirere cya Nijoro cya Maine ku Bihe by'Umwaka
kinyarwanda.maine_has_world_class_dark_skies_what_: Maine ifite ikirere cy'umwijima cyiza ku rwego mpuzamahanga. Icyo wareba kuri buri gihe cy'umwaka.
kinyarwanda.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine ifite ikirere cy'umwijima cyiza cyane — cyane cyane mu majyaruguru y'imijyi. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM na AMC Maine Woods ni ahantu hemewe ku rwego mpuzamahanga h'ikirere cy'umwijima; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, na Cobscook na ho ni h'umwijima mwiza. Amajoro y'itumba ni maremare + asobanutse neza.
kinyarwanda.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: Ubutumwa bukomeye bw'ikirere + ibyabaye 2024-2027. Turi mu bihe bishimishije.
kinyarwanda.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Ubushakashatsi bw'ikirere buri mu ivugururwa rikomeye. Ibihugu bishya (Ubuhinde, Ubuyapani, UAE), amasosiyete mashya y'abikorera (SpaceX, Blue Origin), ubutumwa bushya (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Reba hejuru — kandi utege amatwi.
kinyarwanda.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Incamake yihuse y'ibiri muri sisitemu y'izuba + uko misa igabanijwe.
kinyarwanda.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Izuba rifite 99.86% bya misa yose ya sisitemu y'izuba. Jupiter ifite bibiri bya gatatu bya 0.14% isigaye. Isi + ibindi byose ni ibisigaye.
kinyarwanda.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Kuva ku Kwezi kwacu Luna kugeza kuri Triton + Enceladus. Amwe ni manini kurusha Mercury.
kinyarwanda.most_spectacular_moons_in_the_solar_sy: Amezi ashimishije kurusha andi muri sisitemu y'izuba. Menshi ni manini kurusha Pluto. Europa + Enceladus + Titan afite inyanja munsi y'ubuso kandi ni intego z'ibanze mu bumenyi bw'ubuzima bwo mu kirere.
kinyarwanda.astronomers_report_everything_in_utc_t: Abahanga b'ikirere batangaza byose muri UTC. Ibisobanuro by'uturere tw'igihe.
kinyarwanda.utc_coordinated_universal_time_is_the_: UTC (Igihe Mpuzamahanga Gihuriweho) ni cyo gipimo cy'isi yose. Gishingiye ku masaha ya atomike.
kinyarwanda.astronomers_report_events_in_utc_so_ob: Abahanga b'ikirere batangaza ibyabaye muri UTC kugira ngo ibigo byo ku isi hose bishobore kugereranya. SpaceX yohereza muri UTC. Ubutumwa bwa NASA buri muri UTC.
kinyarwanda.maine_utc_5_est_or_utc_4_edt_london_ut: Maine: UTC-5 (EST) cyangwa UTC-4 (EDT). Londres: UTC+0 (GMT) cyangwa UTC+1 (BST). Ubuyapani: UTC+9.
kinyarwanda.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Inama: iyo usomye gahunda y'ibihe by'ibikorwa by'ubumenyi bw'ikirere, buri gihe reba niba iri muri UTC cyangwa mu gihe cy'aho uri.
kinyarwanda.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC yasimbuye GMT mu 1972. Ishingiye ku masaha ya atomike y'ibigo by'igihugu ku isi hose, hafashwe impuzandengo. Amasegonda yiyongera ashyirwaho igihe bikenewe.
kinyarwanda.40_interactive_tools_to_explore_in_thi: Ibikoresho 40+ bikorana n'umukoresha byo gushakashaka muri iyi porogaramu. Buri kimwe gifungura idirishya rishya ku kintu cy'isanzure.
kinyarwanda.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo: Ibintu 15 by'isanzure bikwiye gushakwa. Byinshi ni ubuntu + biri hafi.
kinyarwanda.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo_2: Ibintu 15 by'isanzure bikwiye gushakwa. Byinshi ntacyo bitwara uretse igihe. Ikirere cya nijoro nta cyo kigusaba — genda ukibonane.
kinyarwanda.12_facts_that_defy_what_you_think_you_: Ibintu 12 bihakana ibyo utekereza ko uzi ku mibumbe.
kinyarwanda.12_things_that_surprise_people_about_o: Ibintu 12 bitangaza abantu ku byerekeye sisitemu yacu y'izuba. Buri kimwe gihakana ishusho isanzwe dutekereza.
kinyarwanda.pioneer_plaques_voyager_golden_records: Ibisate bya Pioneer + Golden Records za Voyager + Ubutumwa bwa Arecibo — ibimenyetso by'abantu ku wo ari we wese ushobora kuba adutega amatwi.
kinyarwanda.gold_anodized_aluminum_on_pioneer_10_1: Aluminiyumu ipfukiranywe na zahabu kuri Pioneer 10 + 11. Yerekana abantu bambaye ubusa, aho Isi iri, na hidorojene.
kinyarwanda.phonograph_record_on_voyager_1_2_115_p: Disiki ya fonogarafe kuri Voyager 1 + 2. Amafoto 115, umuziki (kuva Beethoven kugeza Chuck Berry), indamukanyo mu ndimi 55, amajwi y'Isi.
